---
name: Feature request / New model proposal
about: Suggest a new Monte Carlo model, estimator, or dashboard feature
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve that the current code can't?

## Mathematical specification (for model/estimator changes)

Provide the key equations and a reference (paper, textbook, or Wikipedia with a citation).

```
Example:
  S_{t+1} = S_t · exp(...)
  Reference: Smith (2003), eq. 4.7
```

## Implementation sketch

Optional: rough pseudocode or pointer to where in the codebase this would fit.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought of and why you chose this one.
